segments.text: Okay, if this turns into a reverse 0-to-death, I am going to laugh like you have no idea.
68% returning the favor as of this moment, 78% looking to get even stronger as of this point, but finally Sisqui says yes to it.

full_text: Okay, if this turns into a reverse 0-to-death, I am going to laugh like you have no idea. 68% returning the favor as of this moment, 78% looking to get even stronger as of this point, but finally Sisqui says yes to it.
